# Rani Beauty Clinic — Complete Knowledge Base

> Auto-generated from canonical pricing and clinic identity sources. Last reviewed: April 18, 2026.

## Business Identity

- **Legal Name:** Rani Beauty Clinic
- **Type:** Medical Aesthetics Clinic (Physician-Supervised Medspa)
- **Founded:** 2022
- **Ownership:** Woman-Owned Business
- **Location:** 401 Olympia Ave NE, Suite 101, Renton, WA 98056
- **Phone:** (425) 539-4440
- **Email:** info@ranibeautyclinic.com
- **Website:** https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com
- **Booking:** https://booking.mangomint.com/ranibeautyclinic1
- **Hours:** Monday - Sunday, 10:00 AM - 7:00 PM
- **Google Rating:** 4.9 stars (127+ reviews)

## Medical Director

Dr. Alexander Landfield is the clinic's Medical Director and Board-Certified Neurologist. Every medical treatment is physician-supervised, including neurotoxin injections, device-based aesthetics, and wellness protocols.

## Canonical Pricing Anchors

| Category | Canonical Price Signal |
|---|---|
| Laser Hair Removal | $79 small area, up to $1,199 full body |
| HydraFacial | $99 express, up to $575 Keravive |
| Chemical Peels | $325 VI Peel, $1,399 Cosmelan |
| Sofwave | $1,150 brow lift, $3,999 full face + neck |
| GLP-1 Program | $249 to $699 depending on medication + dose |
| NAD+ Injection | $149 per injection |
| Vitamin B12 Injection | $25 per injection |
| Blood Draw Fee | $25 per visit |

## Service Range Snapshot

- **RF Microneedling:** $495 to $1,500
- **Chemical Peels (all listed options):** $225 to $1,399
- **Core Hormone Therapy Protocols:** $149 to $299 monthly
- **Lab Panel Pricing (excluding draw fee):** $49 to $249

## Safety + Compliance Notes

- Content is educational and does not replace individualized medical advice.
- Treatments are physician-supervised under Dr. Alexander Landfield.
- NAD+ and wellness vitamins are delivered as injections (not IV infusions).
